content-security-policy: script-src 'self';frame-ancestors https://n8n.io https://*.n8n.io https://*.n8n.cloud;img-src 'self' data: blob: https://market-assets.strapi.io https://n8niostorageaccount.blob.core.windows.net;style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';connect-src 'self';font-src 'self';media-src 'self' data: blob:;default-src 'self';base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';object-src 'none';script-src-attr 'none'
